languages.text: [Обратиться к черепу в руках Эоганна] "Нунциус, тебе не кажется, что твой коллега свихнулся?"
[Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к черепу в руках Эоганна] "Нунциус, тебе не кажется, что твой коллега свихнулся?"

traits.locale_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

[Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

languages.text: [Dirigirte al cráneo que sostiene Eogunn] «Nuncius, creo que su colega ha perdido la cabeza, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte al cráneo que sostiene Eogunn] «Nuncius, creo que su colega ha perdido la cabeza, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: 【对伊奥贡手里的头骨说】“努恩修斯，看来你的同僚已经疯了，你觉得呢？”
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: 【对伊奥贡手里的头骨说】“努恩修斯，看来你的同僚已经疯了，你觉得呢？”

languages.text: [Vous adresser au crâne entre les mains d'Eogunn] « Nuncius, je pense que votre collègue a perdu la tête. N'êtes-vous pas d'accord ? »
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Vous adresser au crâne entre les mains d'Eogunn] « Nuncius, je pense que votre collègue a perdu la tête. N'êtes-vous pas d'accord ? »

languages.text: [Den Schädel in Eogunns Händen ansprechen] "Nuncius, ich glaube, Euer Kollege hat den Verstand verloren, findet Ihr nicht auch?"
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

traits.locale_text: [Den Schädel in Eogunns Händen ansprechen] "Nuncius, ich glaube, Euer Kollege hat den Verstand verloren, findet Ihr nicht auch?"

languages.text: [エオグンの手にある頭蓋骨に向かって]、"ヌンシウス、あなたの同僚は正気を失っていると思いますが、そう思いませんか？"と言った。
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"

languages.text: [Eogunn'un ellerinde duran kafatasına hitap et] "Nuncius, sanırım meslektaşın aklını kaçırmış. Sence de öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: [Address the skull in Eogunn's hands] "Nuncius, I believe your colleague has lost his mind, wouldn't you agree?"
